faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day drain fly treatment service throughout Rego Park, Queens. Our technicians can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations and will completely assess and treat your drain fly problem in one comprehensive visit.

faqs.question: What does your $350–$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and potential breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain treatments, mechanical cleaning when necessary, identification and elimination of moisture sources, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing depends on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Why are drain flies so common in Rego Park buildings?
faqs.answer: Rego Park's many older apartment buildings and high-rise complexes often have aging plumbing systems where organic matter accumulates in drains, creating perfect breeding grounds for drain flies. The area's high-density housing and shared plumbing systems can allow drain fly populations to spread quickly between units if not properly treated.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: After our treatment, we recommend regular drain cleaning with hot water and enzymatic cleaners, fixing any leaky pipes or faucets promptly, ensuring proper ventilation in bathrooms and kitchens, and scheduling periodic maintenance treatments. We provide all Rego Park customers with detailed prevention guidelines specific to their property type.
